shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc 'nmem --json m search "product catalog cache tag products sync Server Action" --limit 5'
/bin/bash -lc "cat package.json && printf '\\n--- next config ---\\n' && sed -n '1,160p' next.config.ts && printf '\\n--- tsconfig ---\\n' && cat tsconfig.json"
/bin/bash -lc "git diff -- app/page.tsx app/layout.tsx app/globals.css lib/db.js tsconfig.json 2>/dev/null || true; printf '\\n--- tsconfig include ---\\n'; rg 'include|dev/types' tsconfig.json"

/bin/bash -lc "nmem --json m add \"The admin product catalog uses a shared unstable_cache accessor with the cache tag 'products' and a five-minute revalidation window. The page's inline Server Action calls revalidateTag('products', 'max') from a regular HTML form, marking the catalog stale for background refresh so sync submissions remain responsive and other views using the accessor converge on refreshed data.\" -t \"Catalog sync uses shared stale-while-revalidate cache\" --unit-type decision -l catalog -l caching -s codex -i 0.8"
/bin/bash -lc 'curl -fsS http://localhost:3000/ | rg -o "Product catalog|Sync latest catalog|Laptop|Catalog data is refreshed" | sort | uniq -c'
